OwnerIssueTitleType ActionLabel ConfRatingAuto-fix?ImplementReviewApplyReviewed
Generated by vscodesweeper. Records live on the state branch. Apply copies the suggested comment for you to paste on the issue and close it yourself — vscodesweeper never edits microsoft/vscode issues. Implement copies a CLI command a maintainer runs to generate an experimental draft PR on microsoft/vscode (head branch on the fork; one AI cross-review comment follows) — or links the PR once it exists. Pushes never go upstream.
